text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has officially kicked off this week, with King Halo
going through my beach training program.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I think I've done enough practice at the beach.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. ♪ I guess I'll have to enlighten you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A little bird told me about a top-secret, first-rate training area used
by G1 racers!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's supposedly a super advanced course in the forest behind our
camp. I bet you're unaware of it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Of course you're unaware, it's not easy to come across this
info after all! Even I was only able to find it thanks to my internet
sleuthing skills.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, a lot of posts did warn that amateurs are in for a world full of
pain, but that doesn't apply to me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll handle all the planning, so don't worry! Just follow my lead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Although King Halo seems confident in her choice...

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? King, are you really going to run in the forest tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yeah, why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure it's a good idea? I heard that the course is kinda
questionable...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, no need to fret! As a first-rate racer, I'll show you that I can
run any course thrown at me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I feel uncertain. I better prepare some supplies for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day arrives.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Good morning, Trainer! Today, I grant you the honor of
accompanying me as I put my perfect practice plan into action!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I've prepared thoroughly for this moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I spent last night researching everything I could about the course.
Every important place has been marked on my phone's map!
choice_data_list: Is that the only map you've brought?
Is that the only map you've brought?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh please, we're in the digital age now. I don't need anything else
when I've got everything on my phone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, it looks like you've still got lots to learn. I don't
know why you brought such a heavy backpack with you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, as long as I don't have to carry any excess luggage, I'm
perfectly happy. All right, let's not waste any more time here! Follow
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo's adventure in the mountains begins.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Phew... running on this mountain trail is exhausting. There are too
many uneven areas and natural obstacles in the way.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The roads aren't paved and the humidity is way too high. I wonder
what temperature it is right now... Ah, where's my cellphone—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! There's a b-b-bug!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! Hurry up and do something!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm okay. This isn't enough to make me give up. All right, let me
check the next destination...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, did you happen to see my phone anywhere?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-of course not! I'm just asking a question! A first-rate racer would
never lose her phone...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come on, think... think... Aha!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That must be it! Trainer, remember the place where that bug attacked
us? We have to go back there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I believe it was at the second rest area. Okay, that's a great start. I've
got everything under control. I just need to check the GPS on my
phone...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: —which I don't have!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I-I'm doing perfectly fine! This minor setback isn't going to faze me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna find my phone, I'm gonna get out of this forest, and I'm
gonna go back to the camp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, it's clear things are going downhill. I unfold my map and
begin marking down the places we've been.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, what could you possibly be doing right now?
choice_data_list: I've prepared for this very moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is that a map and a compass in your hands? And that red line...
is that the road we've taken so far?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, that's amazing, Trainer! With this, I'll be able to find
my—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nngh... Yes... please...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Somehow, we managed to return in one piece...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nope, not a single scratch on me, or my phone...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But, I'm surprised by how much preparation you were able to do in
such a short amount of time. I told you about the course only
yesterday.
choice_data_list: Well, I'm trying to be a first-rate trainer.
Well, I'm trying to be a first-rate trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, don't let that get to your head. But I admit, it was my fault this
time. I didn't do nearly enough planning.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't brought that map and compass with you, we would've
probably found ourselves in an even bigger mess.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So I'm... sorry for putting you through all of that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Since today's special, I'll give you a bit of praise. You've
demonstrated traits worthy of being with a first-rate racer such as
myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, we should review what we did today and prepare for
tomorrow's forest training. This time it'll be perfect.
choice_data_list: You want to go again tomorrow?!
You want to go again tomorrow?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Who do you think I am? Words like "impossible" and "give
up" don't exist in my dictionary!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry and go back to the camp now! A first-rate trainer wouldn't
dream of making me wait, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon returning, we immediately begin devising a strategy for
tomorrow's excursion.
